who: paralegals in law firms processing 10-20 legal documents/week
offer: For paralegals in law firms processing 10-20 legal documents/week, inefficient formatting causes delays in court submissions. We automate formatting instead of manual formatting of legal documents using word processors.
problem: Formatting legal documents for court filings is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking solutions
Indie Hackers posts discussing legal document workflows
DM outreach to paralegals with a demo video
Engage in community forums for legal professionals
try_it: Let users try template selection and error-checking on 1-3 documents
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
